data.name: . If they match, your ISO is valid.
data.value: 若兩者一致，即表示您的 ISO 檔案有效。

data.name: 2. Create a bootable USB drive
data.value: 2. 製作可開機 USB 隨身碟

data.name: After downloading the ISO file, verify its integrity to ensure it has not been tampered with.
data.value: 下載 ISO 檔案後，請驗證其完整性，以確保檔案未被篡改。

data.name: After downloading, you may want to learn how to
data.value: 下載完成後，你可能想了解如何

data.name: AnduinOS is community-supported. Your donation helps keep development active and independent.
data.value: AnduinOS 由社區支持。您的捐助有助維持開發工作的活躍與獨立。

data.name: BalenaEtcher is a cross-platform graphical tool that makes flashing ISO images simple and safe.
data.value: BalenaEtcher 是一款跨平台圖形化工具，讓寫入 ISO 映像檔變得簡單又安全。

data.name: Boot from USB and follow the graphical installer.
data.value: 從 USB 啟動並按照圖形化安裝嚮導操作。

data.name: Boot from USB and select the ISO from Ventoy's menu.
data.value: 由 USB 開機，並喺 Ventoy 選單中揀取 ISO。

data.name: Browse the full documentation for detailed guides, tips, and troubleshooting.
data.value: 瀏覽完整文件，獲取詳細指南、技巧及疑難排解方法。

data.name: burn the ISO to a USB drive
Change LBA size to 4K for optimal performance
data.value: 將 LBA 大小更改為 4K 以獲得最佳效能

data.name: Change the system language, regional formats, and add input methods like Chinese Pinyin or Japanese Anthy.
data.value: 變更系統語言、地區格式，並新增如中文拼音或日本 Anthy 之輸入法。

data.name: Click "Flash from file" and select the AnduinOS ISO.
data.value: 點擊「Flash from file」並選擇 AnduinOS ISO。

data.name: Complete the MOK enrollment on first boot to enable third-party drivers like NVIDIA and Xbox controllers.
data.value: 於首次開機時完成 MOK 註冊，以啟用 NVIDIA 及 Xbox 控制器等第三方驅動程式。

data.name: Copy the AnduinOS ISO onto the drive like a regular file.
data.value: 將 AnduinOS ISO 像一般檔案一樣複製到磁碟機中。

data.name: Cross-platform, safe ISO flasher
data.value: 跨平台、安全嘅 ISO 寫入工具

data.name: Enable it in BIOS before booting
data.value: 於開機前在 BIOS 中啟用它

data.name: Enjoy your new OS!
data.value: 盡情享受你嘅新作業系統！

data.name: Feeling generous? AnduinOS works based on donations from users. We are grateful for your support.
data.value: 想慷慨解囊？AnduinOS 依賴用戶捐款運作。感謝您的支持。

data.name: First things to set up when you boot into AnduinOS.
data.value: 首次啟動 AnduinOS 時需設定的項目。

data.name: Free, open-source USB flashing tool
data.value: 免費、開源的 USB 燒錄工具

data.name: If you are new to AnduinOS, you may also want to check out the
data.value: 如果你係第一次用 AnduinOS，你可能都想睇下

data.name: If you frequently install operating systems, Ventoy lets you keep your USB drive usable for regular storage while still being bootable. Simply copy the ISO file onto the drive and boot.
data.value: 如果您經常安裝作業系統，Ventoy 可讓您的 USB 閃存盤在保持可引導的同時，仍可用於常規存儲。只需將 ISO 文件複製到驅動器並啟動即可。

data.name: Impression is the most user-friendly way to flash the ISO on Linux. Install it via Flatpak:
data.value: Impression 係 Linux 上寫入 ISO 最易上手嘅方法。請透過 Flatpak 安裝：

data.name: In GRUB, select your language and choose
data.value: 喺 GRUB 入面揀語言同選擇

data.name: Insert the USB drive and power on your computer.
data.value: 插入 USB 驅動器並開機。

data.name: ISO mode may cause AnduinOS to fail to boot.
data.value: ISO 模式可能會導致 AnduinOS 無法啟動。

data.name: Multi-ISO, reusable USB solution
data.value: 支援多個 ISO、可重複使用的 USB 解決方案

data.name: No repeated flashing or erasing needed!
Press your manufacturer's boot menu key immediately.
data.value: 立即按壓您電腦製造商的開機選單鍵。

data.name: Security patches are applied automatically. For feature updates, use the App Store's offline update mechanism.
data.value: 安全補丁會自動安裝。如需功能更新，請使用 App Store 的離線更新機制。

data.name: Select the USB drive in the boot menu.
data.value: 在啟動選單中選擇 USB 裝置。

data.name: Select your target USB drive and click "Flash!".
data.value: 選擇目標 USB 裝置，然後點擊「Flash!」。

data.name: Simple, modern ISO flashing tool
data.value: 簡單、現代嘅 ISO 燒錄工具

data.name: Something not working? Have a suggestion? Join the discussion on GitHub.
data.value: 遇到問題？有建議？加入 GitHub 討論區。

data.name: Something not working? Have a suggestion? Post about it to discussion.
data.value: 有嘢唔work？有建議？去討論區分享下啦。

data.name: Take a look at documentation, you may find your answers there.
data.value: 睇下說明文件，你可能會喺嗰度搵到答案。

data.name: The AnduinOS graphical installer — straightforward and guided.
data.value: AnduinOS 圖形安裝程式——簡單直觀，全程引導。

data.name: to your USB drive.
data.value: 至您嘅 USB 隨身碟。

data.name: UFW is disabled by default (no open ports = no risk). Enable it via the Welcome Center or graphical Firewall app when needed.
data.value: UFW 預設為停用狀態（無開放端口 = 無風險）。需要時，可透過歡迎中心或圖形化防火牆應用程式啟用。

data.name: Use dd mode, not ISO mode!
data.value: 請使用 dd 模式，切勿使用 ISO 模式！

data.name: Use Deja Dup for automated, encrypted backups to an external drive or cloud storage. Set it once, forget about it.
data.value: 使用 Deja Dup 將資料自動加密備份至外接硬碟或雲端儲存。只需設定一次，便可高枕無憂。

data.name: Use the Welcome Center to install NVIDIA drivers, Xbox controller support, and other hardware drivers with one click.
data.value: 使用歡迎中心，一鍵安裝 NVIDIA 驅動程式、Xbox 控制器支援及其他硬體驅動程式。

data.name: Verify your download and create a bootable USB drive.
data.value: 驗證下載內容並建立可開機 USB 裝置。

data.name: We recommend using Rufus to create the bootable USB drive. Make sure to select
data.value: 建議使用 Rufus 製作可開機 USB 驅動器。請務必選擇

data.name: Your AnduinOS journey starts here. Follow the steps below to get up and running in under 30 minutes.
data.value: 您嘅 AnduinOS 旅程由此開始。跟住以下步驟，30 分鐘內即可順利啟動系統。
